title: sabina scopulorum
intro: Sabina scopulorum, also known as Juniperus scopulorum, is a coniferous tree native to the western United States and southwestern Canada, belonging to the cypress family (Cupressaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, with its essential oil extracted from the needles and bark exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sabina scopulorum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Sabina scopulorum can be found in the form of essential oil, teas, and infusions, often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
